---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## 💡 Feature Description

A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like.

## 🎯 Use Case

Describe the problem this feature would solve:
- What are you trying to accomplish?
- Why can't you do it with the current version?
- Who would benefit from this feature?

## 📝 Proposed Solution

Describe how you think this should work:

```csharp
// Example of how the feature might be used
[NewAttribute(typeof(GameScope))]
public class MyService {
    // ...
}
```

## 🔄 Alternatives Considered

What other approaches have you thought about?
- Alternative A: ...
- Alternative B: ...

## 📊 Impact

- **Affected Components**: [Generator/Analyzer/Runtime/CLI]
- **Breaking Change**: [Yes/No]
- **Backward Compatibility**: [Compatible/Requires Migration]

## 🔍 Additional Context

- Any related issues or discussions?
- Examples from other projects/libraries?
- Why is this better than workarounds?

## 📚 Resources

Links to relevant documentation, discussions, or examples:
- [VContainer docs](https://vcontainer.hadashikick.jp/)
- Related issues: #XX
